case_title: JOHNSON,DONALD VS AUTOMOTIVE CITY SERVICE CENTER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $409.32 FILED BY JOHNSON,DONALD AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOMOTIVE CITY SERVICE CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOMOTIVE CITY SERVICE CENTER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON,DONALD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AUTOMOTIVE CITY SERVICE CENTER $377.32 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $422.32, NO LOSS OF USE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT AUTOMOTIVE CITY SERVICE CENTER
